name: s2j-media-library-date-corrector
description: S2J MediaLibrary Date Corrector is a tool designed to resolve metadata inconsistencies that occur after bulk media uploads in WordPress.
author: Koutarou ISHIKAWA

scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:scss
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:ts:fix && npm run lint:scss:fix
scripts.postinstall_compat: cd tools/docs-linter && npx -y npm@11.11.0 run install:compat
scripts.prelint:docs: cd tools/docs-linter && git restore . && cd ../.. && git submodule update --remote --merge && cd tools/docs-linter && (npm ci || (rm -f package-lock.json && npm install)) && npm run build && cd node_modules/textlint-rule-preset-swift-docs-ja && (npm install || true) && (test -f vite.config.ts || test -f vite.config.js) && npm run build || true && cd ../../..
scripts.prelint:docs_compat: cd tools/docs-linter && git restore . && cd ../.. && git submodule update --remote --merge && cd tools/docs-linter && (npx -y npm@11.11.0 ci || (rm -f package-lock.json && npx -y npm@11.11.0 run install:compat)) && npx -y npm@11.11.0 run build && cd node_modules/textlint-rule-preset-swift-docs-ja && (npx -y npm@11.11.0 install || true) && (test -f vite.config.ts || test -f vite.config.js) && npx -y npm@11.11.0 run build || true && cd ../../..
